content:
My laundry needed to be done, my floor needed to be mopped, my dogs needed to be fed.

Like, I couldn't leave any earlier than.

Damn.

So I did all of those things before I went sore up, but I become , it may seem crazy, but I become more efficient when I have to do much my time..

Okay.

Like, when I go upstairs and I'm cleaning my closet and I'm cleaning it and I'm like, oh, I'm sitting on the floor, I'm through this box looking at everything.

Like, if I know I only have an hour to do it I'm like, fuck box.

I'm going to put you down.

You know, like You make decisions based on hierarchy of like how important it is.

Exactly.

Yeah, yeah.

But I can't my OCCD gets really bad because if I don't if I don't I don't do the things I don't do the things that are my responsibility and I negate my responsibilities , then it's crazy.

Which is why, you know what?
